expansion_prompt: Break down the provisioning into distinct infrastructure components. Focus on parallel deployment and configuration of each, followed by a comprehensive integration and verification step. Key areas: PostgreSQL deployment and configuration, Redis/Valkey deployment and configuration, S3/R2 access setup, ConfigMap creation and validation, and initial network policies. Subagents should include implementers for each component and a tester for overall verification.
reasoning: This task involves architectural work with multiple integration points. It requires deploying and configuring several critical infrastructure components (PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, S3/R2) using Kubernetes operators, setting up cross-service configuration (ConfigMap), and implementing basic network policies. Each component has its own deployment and configuration nuances, making it highly complex.
